extortion.description: Silocaf of New Orleans, Inc. is an experienced coffee processor, translating thorough product knowledge into high standards and superior performance. They utilize the most advanced techniques to weigh, clean and blend coffee according to each client's unique specifications. They have also developed processes which enable them to upgrade an individual coffee's quality by eliminating certain defects. They were founded in New Orleans in 1993. Silocaf of New Orleans is a subsidiary of Pacorini S.r.l. of Trieste, Italy. ===> Phone Number: (504) 896-7800 Revenue: $83.4 Million Employees: 333 Data:178gb Contact: Maurizio Zaves | President & C.E.O. Silocaf USA, LLC One Coffee Plaza - 5240 Coffee Drive New Orleans-LA 70115-7755 - U.S.A. T +1 504 896 7800  I M +1 504 382 760 I F +1 504 896 7834   E m.zaves@silocaf.com
